title: Pet Store The Gorilla Tuff Tyre Dog Toy – Pet Toy, Ideal For Throwing And Retrieval Interactive Games, Discourages Boredom, Help Satisfy Your Dogs Natural Urges To Chew, Diamond Black
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: The Pet Store Gorilla Tuff Tyre Dog Toy is design to provide physical & mental stimulation while discouraging boredom in your dog. Designed to provide hours of fun for your dog.
Ideal for playing throwing and retrieval games with your dog. Should you throw your dog’s toy into water, it does float.
Place your dog’s favourite treat inside the tyre so they can enjoy the challenge and stimulation of getting the treat.
Made from tough durable non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber, so will help satisfy your dog’s natural urge to chew.
description: From the manufacturer The Pet Store Gorilla Tuff Dog Toy Our Gorilla Tuff Tyre Dog Toy is designed for hours of fun providing physical & mental stimulation while discouraging boredom. Ideal for playing throwing and retrieval games with your dog and also floats in water. Treats can be placed inside to give your dog for extra stimulation and a challenge. Extra Tuff Made from tough non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber, will help satisfy you dogs natural urge to chew. Approximate size: 15.5cm x 15.5cm x 3.2cm
